texto: The everyday actions of average citizens have a greater impact on society than any politician. Unfortunately politicians exert a disproportionate amount of influence on the actions of the average citizen. If we all use our own ability to positively influence the people around us, time will erode the negative impact of any politician.
explicacao: Citação de Tom Golway sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The everyday actions of average citizens have a greater impact on society than any politician.
